auth.brand.copy: Sign in to sync conversations, reconnect WebSocket messaging, and continue the same account across devices.

auth.login.hint: Your access and refresh tokens are saved locally with Windows DPAPI encryption.

auth.register.copy: Registration will create the account and return an authenticated session immediately.
auth.register.hint: Keep the password strong. The backend will return fresh access and refresh tokens after registration.
